results.title: Great workout tank
results.reviewText: This top is very light and great for running or the gym. I sadly returned it because it fit a bit smaller than I would have preferred.

results.title: Not the OG but ok
results.reviewText:
The sculpt has been my go to as a yoga instructor for a long time. I have accepted each design change begrudgely, liking the OG the best. This version has less flowyness. It has the same look and feel, yet does not quite flow. I do like the reflective dots are gone, I quite often wear my yoga gear as work gear. 

I still adore the high neck line, especially when I am teaching yoga. I love these tanks to work out in as well. 

Please bring dark moody colours!! Not all of us are pastel princesses, some are moody queens :)

luluResponse.responseText: Your love for the original Sculpt Tank Top isn’t going unnoticed, and neither is the ask. We hear you'd love to see some darker colours added, and we're loving the suggestion. Stay tuned to our weekly drops and sign up for emails to be first in the know of what's to come.

results.title: Wish there were additional sizes!
results.reviewText: I love the sculpt tank top…have several in size 16…very disappointing that the largest size offered now is only a 14. Please bring back other sizes

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for taking the time to share your honest feedback with us. This helps us continually innovate and update our products and sizing to create a better guest experience. To continue the conversation, send us a message at gec@lululemon.com.

results.title: High neck
results.reviewText: I returned this item as i fouund the neck was to high.

results.title: Cute but long
results.reviewText: I really wanted to like this too but I’m 5’2” and it’s too long on me. I’m too old for crop or tight  tanks and prefer to not have racer back, so my options are limited. I wish there was a happy medium for crop vs this length.

results.title: 57 and fit : )
results.reviewText: I love these tanks! I would just love if they would bring back a little length like the sculpt tops had previously.
results.incentivizedReviewLabel: Received free product or lululemon affiliate

results.title: Larger sizes needed please.
results.reviewText: We need larger sizes please.  Can you offer this in navy ?? The crop has a navy.

luluResponse.responseText: We hear your feedback about the sizing and the colour Navy. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us.

results.title: Pickleball Top
results.reviewText: Love the style, the length and the fit of the tank. I would love it even more if the shoulders were a bit wider for a broad shouldered older woman who appreciates a bit more coverage.

luluResponse.responseText: We’re so glad to hear you love the style, length, and fit of the Sculpt Tank Top. We also appreciate your thoughtful suggestion about wider shoulder coverage. Feedback like yours helps us better understand the needs of our guests, and we’ll be sure to share it with our Product team.

results.title: Have this in many colors
results.reviewText: Love this top for CrossFit and running. I have it in many colors. I only wish you’d bring back the back pleat. It provides just a little extra space and breeze.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for sharing your feedback on the Sculpt Tank Top. We're so glad to hear it's become a favourite for both CrossFit and running. It's wonderful to know you've added it to your wardrobe in multiple colours. We also appreciate your feedback about the back pleat and can understand why that extra bit of room and airflow made a difference. We'll be sure to share your suggestion with our product team.

results.title: BEST top for tennis!
results.reviewText:
This is hands down the best light weight top for tennis. I have it in six colors, though I am quite unhappy that LuLu is not making the cropped version in lots of colors like they used to. I REALLY REALLY Wished they would bring it back in colors (just like the full length sculpt). I am having to shop elsewhere to find something similar to the cropped version:(((((
PLEASE PLEASE BRING BACK THE CROPPED IN COLORS!!!

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks so much for sharing the love for this tank top—we hear you're missing more colour options in the cropped style. We're so happy to see your collection growing and we'd love to help add more colours to your lineup. Be first to know when new colours are released by signing up for updates through the Email Sign Up page online.

results.title: Comfortable and cute
results.reviewText: Great top for workouts , nice and light and comfortable . It is a longer length which is nice if you like that

luluResponse.responseText: A great workout go‑to—light, comfy, and easy to move in.

results.title: The seam poked out a bit right at my bust
results.reviewText: I'm 4'11 and wish the front pleat/seam did not fall at the front of my chest. It looked awkward and brought attention to this area. Probably, would be a great shirt for taller person or longer torso.
results.incentivizedReviewLabel: Received free product or lululemon affiliate

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your feedback on this design—fit and seam placement can make all the difference. For personalized guidance on sizing, fit, and feel, connect with our Product Experts via the Contact Us page.

results.title: Like it, not love it. Not as good as original.
results.reviewText: This is a nice top-but really thin and almost flimsy.

results.title: comfy
results.reviewText: not worn yet, but love the feel and flow

luluResponse.responseText: Built to make every moment feel like a breeze.

results.title: Lightweight breezy top
results.reviewText: Nice lightweight, breezy top for working out in the warm months.

luluResponse.responseText: Happy to hear that the Sculpt Tank Top lends itself well to workouts in the summer months.

results.title: Dressy tank, fits large.
results.reviewText:
I ordered my usual size (8) in this tank. My plan is to use it as a “dressy” sleeveless top. 
I like the mesh details. It was much too big all around and especially the arm holes. Went to the store and exchanged for a 4! I sometimes wear a six depending on the fit. 
Very nice top but size down for sure.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your feedback with us on the Sculpt Tank Top. We're glad to hear you liked the mesh details, and we appreciate you noting that you ended up exchanging for a different size—your insight to size down is helpful for others considering it.
